features: 📅 Real LEAP Appointment Creation - Creates actual appointments in LEAP CRM with job association
🔄 Automatic LEAP Sync - Waits for job sync completion, then creates LEAP appointments
⏰ Time Format Conversion - Converts AM/PM to 24-hour format for LEAP compatibility
🏗️ Railway Deployment Fix - Proper yarn workspace integration for cloud deployment
🛡️ Lead Duplication Prevention - Prevents duplicate Customer and Job records in LEAP
🔄 Enhanced Data Preservation - Maintains referral info and rep assignments during updates
🏢 Job Division Field Fix - Properly sets division (e.g., Supplier, Renovation) for all job operations
📝 Enhanced Logging - Comprehensive appointment creation process logging
🚀 Dual Calendar System - Appointments appear in both Staff Calendar AND LEAP CRM
